title: T-008 — Implement SET-004 First Location step (location create form)
prompt:
Implement step 3 form: First Location creation within the warehouse (zone, bin).

PRD §14.3-14.4 SET-004: Form fields:
- Zone (required, text)
- Bin (required, text)

Form submits to POST /api/v1/onboarding/step {step_number: 3, data: {zone, bin}} and creates location in the first warehouse.

Acceptance:
- Form validates required fields
- Location is created in the warehouse created in step 2
- Form submission updates onboarding_state.current_step to 4
- Navigate to step 4 (SET-005) on success

Test: RED test verifies location is created in DB with correct zone/bin.

pipeline_inputs.description: Step 3 RHF form: First Location creation
pipeline_inputs.details: Create FirstLocationStep component using React Hook Form + Zod schema. Fields: (1) zone: text input, required, minLength 1, maxLength 100 (e.g. 'Zone A'). (2) bin: text input, required, minLength 1, maxLength 100 (e.g. 'Bin 1'). Backend logic: POST /api/v1/onboarding/step with step_number=3 should create a location record in the warehouse_id retrieved from the org's first warehouse (created in step 2). Update onboarding_state.current_step to 4. Form validation: both fields required. Submit button shows loading state. On success, navigate to step 4 (SET-005).
acceptance_criteria: Given step 3 form is rendered, when user enters zone='Zone A', bin='Bin 1', then fields show values
Given valid location data submitted, when form submits, then location record is created in the warehouse from step 2
Given location created successfully, when step 3 completes, then onboarding_state.current_step becomes 4
test_strategy: Write e2e test: test_location_form_submission() fills form and verifies location creation in DB
Write e2e test: test_location_in_correct_warehouse() verifies location is in the warehouse from step 2
risk_red_lines: Do not allow submission with empty zone or bin
Do not create location in wrong warehouse (must use warehouse from step 2)
